result.stdout:
Syntax:
  grep -??
  grep [OPTIONS] PATTERN [FILE [FILE ..]]

Shortcut                 Option  with           Envir
    -c             --count-only  on             Command line only
    -l             --file-match  on             Command line only
    -r                --sub-dir  on             Command line only
    -v           --invert-match  on             Command line only
                        --color  COLOR | -
                 --map-shortcut  a=b[,x=y ..]   Envir only
    -i         --case-sensitive  off
    -m              --max-count  NUMBER
    -n            --line-number  on
    -w                   --word  on
    -x              --excl-file  FILE
    -X               --excl-dir  DIR
For example,
  grep -nm 3 class *.cs --color black,yellow -rX obj,bin
  dir2 -sb *.cs --within 4hours | grep -n class -T -

Options can be stored in envir var 'grep'.
https://github.com/ck-yung/grep/blob/master/README.md
